criteria.name: User Base
criteria.description: The number of active users on the platform.

criteria.name: Music Library Size
criteria.description: The total number of songs available in the app's library.

criteria.name: AI Features
criteria.description: The presence and sophistication of AI-powered features such as personalized recommendations, voice assistants, and automatic playlist generation.
criteria.sources: Official app websites, tech blogs, user reviews

criteria.name: User Interface and Experience
criteria.description: The design, ease of use, and overall user experience of the app.
criteria.sources: User reviews, tech blogs, expert reviews

criteria.name: Subscription Cost
criteria.description: The cost of premium subscription plans.

criteria.name: Platform Availability
criteria.description: The number of platforms the app is available on (iOS, Android, Web, Desktop, etc.).

criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: The average rating of the app on various app stores.

criteria.name: Unique Features
criteria.description: Any unique features that set the app apart from competitors.
criteria.sources: Official app websites, tech blogs, user reviews
